parameters.subject: 🎂 Happy Birthday, {{$json.firstName}}!
parameters.html:
Happy Birthday!

Hi {{$json.firstName}},

Wishing you a wonderful birthday! As you celebrate, now is a great time to review your health coverage.

If you're turning 65 soon, congratulations on reaching Medicare eligibility! Would you like to schedule a free consultation to understand your Medicare options?

Book Your Free Review →

To your health,
Larry Buckalew
